message:
feat: legacy parity improvements for history, suggest, and TUI

History serialization parity with Go legacy:
- HistoryBeadCompat.commits changed from Vec to Option<Vec> so empty
  commits serialize as JSON null (matching Go's omitempty behavior)
- Added skip_serializing_if on HistoryMilestonesCompat fields (created,
  claimed, closed, reopened) to omit null milestone entries
- Added skip_serializing_if on HistoryCycleCompat fields to omit null
  cycle time entries
- Normalize empty commit Vec to None after finalization
- All internal code updated to handle Option<Vec> (get_or_insert_with,
  as_deref().unwrap_or_default(), etc.)

Word-boundary-aware event type inference:
- infer_event_type_from_commit now uses has_word_prefix() to prevent
  false positives like "disclose" matching "close" or "exclaim" matching
  "claim". This matches Go's more conservative keyword detection.
- extract_ids_from_message made pub for use in main.rs tests

Suggest sorting parity:
- sort_suggestions tiebreak now compares type strings via as_str() for
  alphabetical ordering matching Go's string-based sort behavior
- Added unit tests covering confidence, type, and target_bead tiebreaks

TUI improvements:
- InsightsPanel enum with 10 panels (bottlenecks, critical path,
  influencers, betweenness, hubs, authorities, k-core, cut points,
  slack, cycles) navigable via s/S keys
- Help overlay now scrollable (j/k, Ctrl+d/u) with position indicator
- Board view overhauled with visual lane bars, card previews with status
  icons, and selection markers instead of flat text listing
- Graph view sorted by critical-path score with header and status icons
- Board shortcuts now work from Detail focus (not just List), removing
  forced focus resets on lane/row/search navigation
- Graph mode 'h' from detail returns to list focus
- History bead-mode commit navigation (J/K) and git-mode related bead
  navigation with proper cursor management
- History timeline refactored: HistoryTimelineEvent struct for
  cross-issue event aggregation, selected_history_event() for git-mode
  Enter/g jump targets
- Default sort now groups open issues above closed, with priority
  secondary sort
- Minor clippy fix: map(|id| id.as_str()) -> map(String::as_str)

Cargo.lock:
- asupersync 0.2.3 -> 0.2.6, franken-decision/evidence/kernel 0.2.0 ->
  0.2.6, ftui ecosystem 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1 (all now from crates.io)
- bincode replaced by bincode-next 2.1.0 (transitive via asupersync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
